_comment: Manifest of UniProt accessions with a Schweke et al. 2024 (PMID 38325366) AF2 homo-oligomer model. Each entry: af_model_num (the _V1_N suffix on the figshare filename) + ecd_only (true when Schweke's nodiso3 contact-clustering filter stripped the TM helix, leaving only the soluble ECD). PDB files for committed entries live under this same dir as {ACC}_V1_{N}.pdb. Generated from a join of data/external/schweke_homomer_atlas/list_models_refset.csv against the UniProt TM annotation; see data/external/schweke_homomer_atlas/PROVENANCE.md.
